recommendations.title: Hammamet
recommendations.overview: The last years of Bettino Craxi, one of the most important and controversial italian leader of the 1980's.

recommendations.title: Nahir
recommendations.overview: One of the most controversial cases in recent years in Argentina, this movie is based on the true story of Nahir Galarza and the murder of her boyfriend that rocked the country. The youngest woman to be convicted and sentenced to life in prison in Ar

recommendations.title: Greater
recommendations.overview: The incredible true story of the greatest walk-on in the history of college football.

recommendations.title: Gett: The Trial of Viviane Amsalem
recommendations.overview: The trial story of Viviane Amsalem's five year fight to obtain her divorce in front of the only legal authority competent for divorce cases in Israel, the Rabbinical Court.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: We Live in Time
recommendations.overview: An up-and-coming chef and a recent divorcée find their lives forever changed when a chance encounter brings them together, in a decade-spanning, deeply moving romance.

recommendations.title: Zorba the Greek
recommendations.overview: An uptight English writer traveling to Crete on a matter of business finds his life changed forever when he meets the gregarious Alexis Zorba.

recommendations.title: Something from Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: One woman's life is forever changed by an engagement ring meant for someone else.

recommendations.title: The Mauritanian
recommendations.overview: The true story of the Mauritanian Mohamedou Ould Slahi, who was held at the U.S military's Guantanamo Bay detention center without charges for over a decade and sought help from a defense attorney for his release.

recommendations.title: The Fallout
recommendations.overview: In the wake of a school tragedy, Vada, Mia and Quinton form a unique and dynamic bond as they navigate the never linear, often confusing journey to heal in a world that feels forever changed.
